By visiting the Jaguar Centre, your donation will go directly to caring for rainforest animals. Guided 1.5 hr visits are daily at 09.30 am and 11.30 am. Entrance fee: US$27. Private tours are also available. These combo tours include a visit to the Jaguar Rescue Center:Combo tour with the Jaguar Rescue Centre, Chocolate making and a guided hike to a waterfall
